title: JD Vance warns Iran against trying to ‘play’ the US in peace talks
description: US vice-president flies to Islamabad for negotiations as Iranians insists Israel end its offensive in Lebanon
content:
JD Vance has warned Iran not to “try and play” the US at talks planned for Saturday in Islamabad, while Tehran said it would not take part until Israel stopped bombing of Lebanon.
The US vice-president made the comments as he boarded a plane to Pakis... [6930 chars]

title: US-Iran talks: The five sticking points for Islamabad negotiations
description: Peace talks between the US and Iran are due to begin in Pakistan on Saturday.
content:
The venue is ready, the guards are in place and the curb along the approach road has received a fresh coat of yellow and black paint.
Islamabad awaits.
As hosts of vital US-Iranian talks, the Pakistani government officials are making optimistic noise... [4418 chars]

title: Fuel-price protests cause chaos in Ireland and spread to Norway
description: Hauliers and farmers block motorways and bring parts of Dublin to a standstill in fourth day of action
content:
Protests over fuel prices have caused chaos in Ireland and spread to Norway in a knock-on effect from the conflict in the Middle East.
Hauliers, farmers and other groups blocked motorways and brought parts of Dublin to a standstill on Friday in a fou... [4481 chars]

title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
description: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.
content:
The world's largest known group of wild chimpanzees has split and been locked in a vicious "civil war" for the last eight years, according to researchers.
It is not clear exactly why the once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees at Uganda's Kiba... [3752 chars]

title: ‘This is as important as your teeth’: are you skipping this key part of mouth hygiene?
description: Some dentists say cleaning your tongue is as important as brushing your teeth. Here’s how it’s done
content:
It’s drilled into us from a young age: brush your teeth twice a day. But when it comes to oral health, experts say we’re leaving out something important.
“Everyone needs to be educated about cleaning the tongue,” says Dr Maria Figueroa, a dentist and... [5230 chars]
